parsed.production_notes: The video is a static AI-generated image animated with lip-sync tools. The man's face is uncanny, the robot is CGI, and the background waves loop unnaturally.

characters.appearance: Young Indian man, medium build, dark complexion, short black hair.
characters.wardrobe: Blue patterned short-sleeve shirt and dark trousers.

characters.appearance: Humanoid robot, metallic grey, female-coded body shape, smooth face with no distinct human features.

scenes.setting: Sandy beach during the day, ocean and distant lighthouse in background.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young Indian man and a metallic humanoid robot sit cross-legged on a sandy beach, facing each other in profile. The man is on the left, wearing a blue patterned short-sleeve shirt and dark trousers. The robot is on the right, made of smooth grey metal. The background features a calm ocean and a distant coastline with a red and white lighthouse. The lighting is bright and even.

scenes.visual_description: The scene shows a man and a robot conversing on a beach. Text overlays appear on screen, including 'Myself Karthik' with a red X, and 'I am Karthik' with a green checkmark. The camera remains static.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Interview-ல Myself Karthik-னு intro குடுக்கலாமா? [Can I introduce myself as 'Myself Karthik' in an interview?]
Character B says: வேணாம் கார்த்திக். Myself அப்படின்னு ஆரம்பிக்கிறது தப்பு. "I am Karthik" இல்லனா "My name is Karthik"-னு சொல்லுங்க. அதான் கெத்தா இருக்கும். [No Karthik. Starting with 'Myself' is wrong. Say "I am Karthik" or "My name is Karthik". That will be stylish.]
Character A says: அட ஆமாப்பா. ஆனா எனக்கு இங்கிலீஷ் பேச வராதே. [Oh yes. But I don't know how to speak English.]

scenes.visual_description: The man and robot continue their conversation. Several graphics pop up over the video: a clock, a pricing card showing '3 days of Premium benefits for ₹1', and screenshots of the 'MySivi AI' app on the Google Play Store. The camera remains static.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: பயப்படாதீங்க. என் கூட டெய்லி 15 நிமிஷம் பேசுங்க. அப்புறம் பாருங்க நீங்க இங்கிலீஷ்ல பேசுற மாஸை. [Don't be afraid. Speak with me for 15 minutes daily. Then see the mass of you speaking in English.]
Character A says: பீஸ் அதிகமா இருக்குமோ? [Will the fees be high?]
Character B says: வெறும் ஒரு ரூபாய்க்கு MySivi ஆப்-அ ட்ரை பண்ணலாம். ஒரு கோடிக்கும் மேல மக்கள் நம்ம கூட படிச்சிட்டு இருக்காங்க. [You can try the MySivi app for just one rupee. Over one crore people are studying with us.]
Character A says: சூப்பர். இப்பவே இன்ஸ்டால் பண்றேன். [Super. I will install it right now.]
